name: code_review_32_tasks
description: 32 code review tasks across 4 categories with varying semantic similarity. Style and security tasks cluster tightly; architecture reviews are more unique.
tasks: Review this Python function for PEP 8 style compliance: variable naming, line length, and whitespace conventions.
Check the following Python code for PEP 8 formatting issues including indentation, spacing around operators, and import ordering.
Evaluate this Python module for adherence to PEP 8 style guidelines, focusing on naming conventions and line length limits.
Review this function for Python style best practices: consistent naming, proper docstrings, and formatting standards.
Audit this code for PEP 8 violations including unused imports, trailing whitespace, and inconsistent indentation.
Check this Python class for style compliance: method naming, class naming conventions, and consistent formatting.
Review this module for formatting consistency: blank lines between functions, import grouping, and string quote style.
Evaluate this Python script for code style issues including magic numbers, hardcoded strings, and naming patterns.
Review this authentication handler for SQL injection vulnerabilities in the user login query.
Check this API endpoint for potential SQL injection attacks in the search parameter handling.
Audit this database query builder for injection vulnerabilities where user input is concatenated into SQL strings.
Review this form handler for cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in the template rendering.
Check this REST API for XSS risks where user-submitted content is rendered without sanitization.
Audit this web endpoint for CSRF protection: verify tokens are validated on state-changing requests.
Review this file upload handler for path traversal vulnerabilities in the filename processing.
Check this authentication flow for insecure token storage and session management issues.
Analyze this database query for N+1 performance issues and suggest batch loading optimizations.
Review this API endpoint for performance bottlenecks: unnecessary database calls, missing caching, and redundant computations.
Evaluate this data processing pipeline for memory efficiency: large object allocations, missing generators, and buffer management.
Check this loop-heavy function for algorithmic complexity issues and suggest more efficient alternatives.
Review this search implementation for performance: missing indexes, full table scans, and query plan analysis.
Analyze this caching strategy for cache invalidation issues, thundering herd problems, and TTL configuration.
Evaluate this batch processing job for parallelization opportunities and resource utilization.
Review this real-time data pipeline for throughput bottlenecks and backpressure handling.
Review the microservice decomposition of this payment processing system for proper bounded context separation.
Evaluate this event-driven architecture for eventual consistency handling and saga pattern implementation.
Review this API gateway design for proper rate limiting, circuit breaking, and retry strategies.
Analyze this multi-tenant architecture for data isolation, resource partitioning, and noisy neighbor prevention.
Review this distributed caching architecture for consistency guarantees and partition tolerance trade-offs.
Evaluate this message queue topology for ordering guarantees, dead letter handling, and consumer group design.
Review this CI/CD pipeline architecture for deployment safety: rollback strategies, canary releases, and feature flags.
Analyze this observability stack for gaps in distributed tracing, metric collection, and alerting thresholds.
